title: Player Movement Reference Trace Extraction
purpose: Define the first preserved gameplay windows and measurement families for extracting movement traces from Galaga reference footage before the next Aurora movement-tuning pass.

sourceFamilies.role: Preferred first-pass source for opening movement windows and visible ship motion.
Secondary source for later-stage movement and lane-correction windows once the opening trace family is established.

traceFamilies.question: How far does the ship move on a short directional tap, and how quickly does it settle?
How quickly does the ship cover lane distance under a held input?
How quickly can the ship reverse through center and stabilize?
Does firing interrupt movement cadence or visible travel?

firstPassWindows.notes: Early opening correction in a low-pressure lane setup before the first strong dive-response moment.
Sustained lateral move in the same opening family to establish baseline cruise travel.
Single reversal window around an early visible dive-response setup.
Movement plus firing window in the opening family to measure shot-interrupt effects.
